title: Dynamic MobCap
description: Mod for server admins to control capacity of spawned mobs just in the game without reloads. Fork of "Increase Mob Cap" mod
body:
# Dynamic MobCap || Increase MobCap
It is a fork of **Increase MobCap** mod. This version makes possible to modify mobCaps **right in the game**, without configs and reloads, as it was in its father.\
_So it inherits imc (increase mob cap) name in code._\

## USAGE
_/**imc mobcap set** <MOBCAP_TYPE> #Changes cap for one of spawn types_\
#You can set several caps and update after that\
_/**imc mobcap update** #Synchronises changes with the server_\

#Also there is a command **count**. It counts selected entities and outputs to the chat, how many there are.\
_/**imc count** <SELECTOR>_

Selector is @e for example, or @e[distance=..50]

[Source Code](https://github.com/TemanSv1n/IncreaseMobCap)
